action.proof_term:
intro n N hn H hnN hres
  have shift : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 45) ≤ 47 := by
    have hsub : n - 45 < n := by omega
    let f : Fin n → ℕ := fun x => (x : ℕ) + ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 x
    have hbdd : BddAbove (Set.range f) := by
      refine ⟨2 * n, ?_⟩
      rintro y ⟨x, rfl⟩
      dsimp [f]
      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
      have hc := Nat.card_divisors_le_self (x : ℕ)
      have hx : (x : ℕ) < n := x.isLt
      omega
    let mm : Fin n := ⟨n - 45, hsub⟩
    have hm : f mm ≤ n + 2 := le_trans (le_ciSup hbdd mm) H
    dsimp [f, mm] at hm
    omega
  set q := N / 46189 with hq_def
  have hNeq : N = 46189 * q + 26884 := by omega
  have hn45lin : n = 14535 * 8008 * q + 14535 * 4661 + 45 := by rw [hnN, hNeq]; ring
  have hn45 : n - 45 = 14535 * (8008 * q + 4661) := by
    have h1 : n - 45 = 14535 * 8008 * q + 14535 * 4661 := by omega
    rw [h1]; ring
  set eval := 8008 * q + 4661 with heval_def
  have heval2 : 2 ≤ eval := by dsimp [eval]; omega
  have heval_ge : 4661 ≤ eval := by dsimp [eval]; omega
  have hn45ne : n - 45 ≠ 0 := by omega
  have hmono : ∀ a : ℕ, a ∣ (n - 45) → ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 a ≤ ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 45) := by
    intro a hadvd
    have hsub2 : a.divisors ⊆ (n - 45).divisors := by
      intro d hd
      rw [Nat.mem_divisors] at hd ⊢
      exact ⟨hd.1.trans hadvd, hn45ne⟩
    rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply, ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
    exact Finset.card_le_card hsub2
  have hclose : ∀ D : ℕ, D ∣ eval → 47 < ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (14535 * D) → False := by
    intro D hDdvd hsig
    have hDm : 14535 * D ∣ (n - 45) := by rw [hn45]; exact Nat.mul_dvd_mul_left 14535 hDdvd
    have := hmono (14535 * D) hDm
    omega
  have hexists_other : ∀ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p → p ∣ eval → (∀ s, eval ≠ p ^ s) →
      ∃ p' : ℕ, Nat.Prime p' ∧ p' ∣ eval ∧ p' ≠ p := by
    intro p hp hpdvd hnotpow
    by_contra hnone
    push_neg at hnone
    have heval0 : eval ≠ 0 := by omega
    have hpow := Nat.eq_prime_pow_of_unique_prime_dvd heval0 (fun {r} hq hqd => hnone r hq hqd)
    exact hnotpow _ hpow
  have hnopow : ∀ base : ℕ, Nat.Prime base → ((base:ZMod 8)^2 = 1) →
      (((45 + 14535 * base ^ 0 : ℕ) : ZMod 8) ≠ 0) → (((45 + 14535 * base ^ 1 : ℕ) : ZMod 8) ≠ 0) →
      ∀ s : ℕ, eval ≠ base ^ s := by
    intro base hbp hbsq hb0 hb1 s hs
    have hpoweq : 2520 * N = 45 + 14535 * base ^ s := by
      have heq2 : n - 45 = 14535 * base ^ s := by rw [hn45, hs]
      omega
    have hz : (((2520 * N : ℕ) : ZMod 8)) = (((45 + 14535 * base ^ s : ℕ) : ZMod 8)) := by
      exact_mod_cast congrArg (fun x : ℕ => (x : ZMod 8)) hpoweq
    have hsdecomp : s = 2 * (s / 2) + s % 2 := by omega
    rw [hsdecomp, pow_add, pow_mul] at hz
    push_cast at hz
    rw [hbsq, one_pow, one_mul] at hz
    have h2520zero : (2520 : ZMod 8) = 0 := by native_decide
    rw [h2520zero, zero_mul] at hz
    have hmodlt : s % 2 < 2 := Nat.mod_lt _ (by norm_num)
    interval_cases hh : s % 2
    · exact hb0 (by push_cast; push_cast at hz; simpa using hz.symm)
    · exact hb1 (by push_cast; push_cast at hz; simpa using hz.symm)
  have hnopow3 : ∀ s : ℕ, eval ≠ 3 ^ s := by
    apply hnopow 3 (by norm_num) (by native_decide) (by native_decide) (by native_decide)
  have hnopow17 : ∀ s : ℕ, eval ≠ 17 ^ s := by
    apply hnopow 17 (by norm_num) (by native_decide) (by native_decide) (by native_decide)
  have hnopow19 : ∀ s : ℕ, eval ≠ 19 ^ s := by
    apply hnopow 19 (by norm_num) (by native_decide) (by native_decide) (by native_decide)
  have hnopow5 : ∀ s : ℕ, eval ≠ 5 ^ s := by
    intro s hs
    have heq2 : n - 45 = 9 * (5 ^ (s + 1) * 323) := by rw [hn45, hs]; ring
    have hcop_9_rest : Nat.Coprime 9 (5 ^ (s + 1) * 323) := by
      have h9_5 : Nat.Coprime 9 5 := by norm_num
      have h9_323 : Nat.Coprime 9 323 := by norm_num
      exact (h9_5.pow_right (s + 1)).mul_right h9_323
    have hcop_5_323 : Nat.Coprime (5 ^ (s + 1)) 323 := by
      have h5_323 : Nat.Coprime 5 323 := by norm_num
      exact h5_323.pow_left (s + 1)
    have hsigeq : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 45) =
        ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 9 * (ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (5 ^ (s + 1)) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 323) := by
      rw [heq2, ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop_9_rest,
        ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop_5_323]
    have hsig9 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 9 = 3 := by native_decide
    have hsig323b : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 323 = 4 := by native_decide
    have hsig5pow : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (5 ^ (s + 1)) = s + 2 := by
      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply_prime_pow (by norm_num : Nat.Prime 5)]
    rw [hsig9, hsig5pow, hsig323b] at hsigeq
    have hsle : 3 * ((s + 2) * 4) ≤ 47 := by rw [← hsigeq]; exact shift
    have hsbound : s ≤ 1 := by omega
    interval_cases s
    · norm_num at hs; omega
    · norm_num at hs; omega
  by_cases h3 : 3 ∣ eval
  · by_cases h5 : 5 ∣ eval
    · have h15 : (15:ℕ) ∣ eval := Nat.Coprime.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd (by norm_num) h3 h5
      exact hclose 15 h15 (by native_decide)
    · by_cases h17 : 17 ∣ eval
      · have h51 : (51:ℕ) ∣ eval := Nat.Coprime.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd (by norm_num) h3 h17
        exact hclose 51 h51 (by native_decide)
      · by_cases h19 : 19 ∣ eval
        · have h57 : (57:ℕ) ∣ eval := Nat.Coprime.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd (by norm_num) h3 h19
          exact hclose 57 h57 (by native_decide)
        · obtain ⟨p, hp, hpdvd, hpne⟩ := hexists_other 3 (by norm_num) h3 hnopow3
          have hp3cop : Nat.Coprime 3 p := (Nat.coprime_primes (by norm_num) hp).mpr (Ne.symm hpne)
          have h3p : (3 * p) ∣ eval := hp3cop.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd h3 hpdvd
          have hcop43605 : Nat.Coprime 43605 p := by
            have hfac : (43605:ℕ).primeFactors = {3, 5, 17, 19} := by native_decide
            refine ((hp.coprime_iff_not_dvd).mpr ?_).symm
            intro hpdvd43605
            have hpmem : p ∈ (43605:ℕ).primeFactors := Nat.mem_primeFactors.mpr ⟨hp, hpdvd43605, by norm_num⟩
            rw [hfac] at hpmem
            simp at hpmem
            rcases hpmem with rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl
            · exact hpne rfl
            · exact h5 hpdvd
            · exact h17 hpdvd
            · exact h19 hpdvd
          have hsigp : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 p = 2 := by
            rw [show p = p ^ 1 from (pow_one p).symm, ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply_prime_pow hp]
          have hs43605 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 43605 = 32 := by native_decide
          have hfinal : 47 < ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (14535 * (3 * p)) := by
            have heq : 14535 * (3 * p) = 43605 * p := by ring
            rw [heq, ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop43605, hs43605, hsigp]
            norm_num
          exact hclose (3 * p) h3p hfinal
  · by_cases h5 : 5 ∣ eval
    · by_cases h17 : 17 ∣ eval
      · have h85 : (85:ℕ) ∣ eval := Nat.Coprime.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd (by norm_num) h5 h17
        exact hclose 85 h85 (by native_decide)
      · by_cases h19 : 19 ∣ eval
        · have h95 : (95:ℕ) ∣ eval := Nat.Coprime.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd (by norm_num) h5 h19
          exact hclose 95 h95 (by native_decide)
        · obtain ⟨p, hp, hpdvd, hpne⟩ := hexists_other 5 (by norm_num) h5 hnopow5
          have hp5cop : Nat.Coprime 5 p := (Nat.coprime_primes (by norm_num) hp).mpr (Ne.symm hpne)
          have h5p : (5 * p) ∣ eval := hp5cop.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd h5 hpdvd
          have hcop72675 : Nat.Coprime 72675 p := by
            have hfac : (72675:ℕ).primeFactors = {3, 5, 17, 19} := by native_decide
            refine ((hp.coprime_iff_not_dvd).mpr ?_).symm
            intro hpdvd72675
            have hpmem : p ∈ (72675:ℕ).primeFactors := Nat.mem_primeFactors.mpr ⟨hp, hpdvd72675, by norm_num⟩
            rw [hfac] at hpmem
            simp at hpmem
            rcases hpmem with rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl
            · exact h3 hpdvd
            · exact hpne rfl
            · exact h17 hpdvd
            · exact h19 hpdvd
          have hsigp : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 p = 2 := by
            rw [show p = p ^ 1 from (pow_one p).symm, ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply_prime_pow hp]
          have hs72675 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 72675 = 36 := by native_decide
          have hfinal : 47 < ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (14535 * (5 * p)) := by
            have heq : 14535 * (5 * p) = 72675 * p := by ring
            rw [heq, ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop72675, hs72675, hsigp]
            norm_num
          exact hclose (5 * p) h5p hfinal
    · by_cases h17 : 17 ∣ eval
      · by_cases h19 : 19 ∣ eval
        · have h323 : (323:ℕ) ∣ eval := Nat.Coprime.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd (by norm_num) h17 h19
          exact hclose 323 h323 (by native_decide)
        · obtain ⟨p, hp, hpdvd, hpne⟩ := hexists_other 17 (by norm_num) h17 hnopow17
          have hp17cop : Nat.Coprime 17 p := (Nat.coprime_primes (by norm_num) hp).mpr (Ne.symm hpne)
          have h17p : (17 * p) ∣ eval := hp17cop.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd h17 hpdvd
          have hcop247095 : Nat.Coprime 247095 p := by
            have hfac : (247095:ℕ).primeFactors = {3, 5, 17, 19} := by native_decide
            refine ((hp.coprime_iff_not_dvd).mpr ?_).symm
            intro hpdvd247095
            have hpmem : p ∈ (247095:ℕ).primeFactors := Nat.mem_primeFactors.mpr ⟨hp, hpdvd247095, by norm_num⟩
            rw [hfac] at hpmem
            simp at hpmem
            rcases hpmem with rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl
            · exact h3 hpdvd
            · exact h5 hpdvd
            · exact hpne rfl
            · exact h19 hpdvd
          have hsigp : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 p = 2 := by
            rw [show p = p ^ 1 from (pow_one p).symm, ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply_prime_pow hp]
          have hs247095 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 247095 = 36 := by native_decide
          have hfinal : 47 < ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (14535 * (17 * p)) := by
            have heq : 14535 * (17 * p) = 247095 * p := by ring
            rw [heq, ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop247095, hs247095, hsigp]
            norm_num
          exact hclose (17 * p) h17p hfinal
      · by_cases h19 : 19 ∣ eval
        · obtain ⟨p, hp, hpdvd, hpne⟩ := hexists_other 19 (by norm_num) h19 hnopow19
          have hp19cop : Nat.Coprime 19 p := (Nat.coprime_primes (by norm_num) hp).mpr (Ne.symm hpne)
          have h19p : (19 * p) ∣ eval := hp19cop.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd h19 hpdvd
          have hcop276165 : Nat.Coprime 276165 p := by
            have hfac : (276165:ℕ).primeFactors = {3, 5, 17, 19} := by native_decide
            refine ((hp.coprime_iff_not_dvd).mpr ?_).symm
            intro hpdvd276165
            have hpmem : p ∈ (276165:ℕ).primeFactors := Nat.mem_primeFactors.mpr ⟨hp, hpdvd276165, by norm_num⟩
            rw [hfac] at hpmem
            simp at hpmem
            rcases hpmem with rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl
            · exact h3 hpdvd
            · exact h5 hpdvd
            · exact h17 hpdvd
            · exact hpne rfl
          have hsigp : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 p = 2 := by
            rw [show p = p ^ 1 from (pow_one p).symm, ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply_prime_pow hp]
          have hs276165 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 276165 = 36 := by native_decide
          have hfinal : 47 < ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (14535 * (19 * p)) := by
            have heq : 14535 * (19 * p) = 276165 * p := by ring
            rw [heq, ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop276165, hs276165, hsigp]
            norm_num
          exact hclose (19 * p) h19p hfinal
        · obtain ⟨p, hp, hpdvd⟩ := Nat.exists_prime_and_dvd (show eval ≠ 1 by omega)
          have hcop14535 : Nat.Coprime 14535 p := by
            have hfac : (14535:ℕ).primeFactors = {3, 5, 17, 19} := by native_decide
            refine ((hp.coprime_iff_not_dvd).mpr ?_).symm
            intro hpdvd14535
            have hpmem : p ∈ (14535:ℕ).primeFactors := Nat.mem_primeFactors.mpr ⟨hp, hpdvd14535, by norm_num⟩
            rw [hfac] at hpmem
            simp at hpmem
            rcases hpmem with rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl
            · exact h3 hpdvd
            · exact h5 hpdvd
            · exact h17 hpdvd
            · exact h19 hpdvd
          have hsigp : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 p = 2 := by
            rw [show p = p ^ 1 from (pow_one p).symm, ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply_prime_pow hp]
          have hs14535 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 14535 = 24 := by native_decide
          have hfinal : 47 < ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (14535 * p) := by
            rw [ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop14535, hs14535, hsigp]
            norm_num
          exact hclose p hpdvd hfinal

intro n N hn H hnN hres
  have shift : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 45) ≤ 47 := by
    have hsub : n - 45 < n := by omega
    let f : Fin n → ℕ := fun x => (x : ℕ) + ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 x
    have hbdd : BddAbove (Set.range f) := by
      refine ⟨2 * n, ?_⟩
      rintro y ⟨x, rfl⟩
      dsimp [f]
      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
      have hc := Nat.card_divisors_le_self (x : ℕ)
      have hx : (x : ℕ) < n := x.isLt
      omega
    let mm : Fin n := ⟨n - 45, hsub⟩
    have hm : f mm ≤ n + 2 := le_trans (le_ciSup hbdd mm) H
    dsimp [f, mm] at hm
    omega
  set q := N / 46189 with hq_def
  have hNeq : N = 46189 * q + 26884 := by omega
  have hn45lin : n = 14535 * 8008 * q + 14535 * 4661 + 45 := by rw [hnN, hNeq]; ring
  have hn45 : n - 45 = 14535 * (8008 * q + 4661) := by
    have h1 : n - 45 = 14535 * 8008 * q + 14535 * 4661 := by omega
    rw [h1]; ring
  set eval := 8008 * q + 4661 with heval_def
  have heval2 : 2 ≤ eval := by dsimp [eval]; omega
  have heval_ge : 4661 ≤ eval := by dsimp [eval]; omega
  have hn45ne : n - 45 ≠ 0 := by omega
  have hmono : ∀ a : ℕ, a ∣ (n - 45) → ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 a ≤ ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 45) := by
    intro a hadvd
    have hsub2 : a.divisors ⊆ (n - 45).divisors := by
      intro d hd
      rw [Nat.mem_divisors] at hd ⊢
      exact ⟨hd.1.trans hadvd, hn45ne⟩
    rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply, ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
    exact Finset.card_le_card hsub2
  have hclose : ∀ D : ℕ, D ∣ eval → 47 < ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (14535 * D) → False := by
    intro D hDdvd hsig
    have hDm : 14535 * D ∣ (n - 45) := by rw [hn45]; exact Nat.mul_dvd_mul_left 14535 hDdvd
    have := hmono (14535 * D) hDm
    omega
  have hexists_other : ∀ p : ℕ, Nat.Prime p → p ∣ eval → (∀ s, eval ≠ p ^ s) →
      ∃ p' : ℕ, Nat.Prime p' ∧ p' ∣ eval ∧ p' ≠ p := by
    intro p hp hpdvd hnotpow
    by_contra hnone
    push_neg at hnone
    have heval0 : eval ≠ 0 := by omega
    have hpow := Nat.eq_prime_pow_of_unique_prime_dvd heval0 (fun {r} hq hqd => hnone r hq hqd)
    exact hnotpow _ hpow
  have hnopow : ∀ base : ℕ, Nat.Prime base → ((base:ZMod 8)^2 = 1) →
      (((45 + 14535 * base ^ 0 : ℕ) : ZMod 8) ≠ 0) → (((45 + 14535 * base ^ 1 : ℕ) : ZMod 8) ≠ 0) →
      ∀ s : ℕ, eval ≠ base ^ s := by
    intro base hbp hbsq hb0 hb1 s hs
    have hpoweq : 2520 * N = 45 + 14535 * base ^ s := by
      have heq2 : n - 45 = 14535 * base ^ s := by rw [hn45, hs]
      omega
    have hz : (((2520 * N : ℕ) : ZMod 8)) = (((45 + 14535 * base ^ s : ℕ) : ZMod 8)) := by
      exact_mod_cast congrArg (fun x : ℕ => (x : ZMod 8)) hpoweq
    have hsdecomp : s = 2 * (s / 2) + s % 2 := by omega
    rw [hsdecomp, pow_add, pow_mul] at hz
    push_cast at hz
    rw [hbsq, one_pow, one_mul] at hz
    have h2520zero : (2520 : ZMod 8) = 0 := by native_decide
    rw [h2520zero, zero_mul] at hz
    have hmodlt : s % 2 < 2 := Nat.mod_lt _ (by norm_num)
    interval_cases hh : s % 2
    · exact hb0 (by push_cast; push_cast at hz; simpa using hz.symm)
    · exact hb1 (by push_cast; push_cast at hz; simpa using hz.symm)
  have hnopow3 : ∀ s : ℕ, eval ≠ 3 ^ s := by
    apply hnopow 3 (by norm_num) (by native_decide) (by native_decide) (by native_decide)
  have hnopow17 : ∀ s : ℕ, eval ≠ 17 ^ s := by
    apply hnopow 17 (by norm_num) (by native_decide) (by native_decide) (by native_decide)
  have hnopow19 : ∀ s : ℕ, eval ≠ 19 ^ s := by
    apply hnopow 19 (by norm_num) (by native_decide) (by native_decide) (by native_decide)
  have hnopow5 : ∀ s : ℕ, eval ≠ 5 ^ s := by
    intro s hs
    have heq2 : n - 45 = 9 * (5 ^ (s + 1) * 323) := by rw [hn45, hs]; ring
    have hcop_9_rest : Nat.Coprime 9 (5 ^ (s + 1) * 323) := by
      have h9_5 : Nat.Coprime 9 5 := by norm_num
      have h9_323 : Nat.Coprime 9 323 := by norm_num
      exact (h9_5.pow_right (s + 1)).mul_right h9_323
    have hcop_5_323 : Nat.Coprime (5 ^ (s + 1)) 323 := by
      have h5_323 : Nat.Coprime 5 323 := by norm_num
      exact h5_323.pow_left (s + 1)
    have hsigeq : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 45) =
        ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 9 * (ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (5 ^ (s + 1)) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 323) := by
      rw [heq2, ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop_9_rest,
        ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop_5_323]
    have hsig9 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 9 = 3 := by native_decide
    have hsig323b : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 323 = 4 := by native_decide
    have hsig5pow : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (5 ^ (s + 1)) = s + 2 := by
      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply_prime_pow (by norm_num : Nat.Prime 5)]
    rw [hsig9, hsig5pow, hsig323b] at hsigeq
    have hsle : 3 * ((s + 2) * 4) ≤ 47 := by rw [← hsigeq]; exact shift
    have hsbound : s ≤ 1 := by omega
    interval_cases s
    · norm_num at hs; omega
    · norm_num at hs; omega
  by_cases h3 : 3 ∣ eval
  · by_cases h5 : 5 ∣ eval
    · have h15 : (15:ℕ) ∣ eval := Nat.Coprime.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd (by norm_num) h3 h5
      exact hclose 15 h15 (by native_decide)
    · by_cases h17 : 17 ∣ eval
      · have h51 : (51:ℕ) ∣ eval := Nat.Coprime.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd (by norm_num) h3 h17
        exact hclose 51 h51 (by native_decide)
      · by_cases h19 : 19 ∣ eval
        · have h57 : (57:ℕ) ∣ eval := Nat.Coprime.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd (by norm_num) h3 h19
          exact hclose 57 h57 (by native_decide)
        · obtain ⟨p, hp, hpdvd, hpne⟩ := hexists_other 3 (by norm_num) h3 hnopow3
          have hp3cop : Nat.Coprime 3 p := (Nat.coprime_primes (by norm_num) hp).mpr (Ne.symm hpne)
          have h3p : (3 * p) ∣ eval := hp3cop.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd h3 hpdvd
          have hcop43605 : Nat.Coprime 43605 p := by
            have hfac : (43605:ℕ).primeFactors = {3, 5, 17, 19} := by native_decide
            refine ((hp.coprime_iff_not_dvd).mpr ?_).symm
            intro hpdvd43605
            have hpmem : p ∈ (43605:ℕ).primeFactors := Nat.mem_primeFactors.mpr ⟨hp, hpdvd43605, by norm_num⟩
            rw [hfac] at hpmem
            simp at hpmem
            rcases hpmem with rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl
            · exact hpne rfl
            · exact h5 hpdvd
            · exact h17 hpdvd
            · exact h19 hpdvd
          have hsigp : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 p = 2 := by
            rw [show p = p ^ 1 from (pow_one p).symm, ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply_prime_pow hp]
          have hs43605 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 43605 = 32 := by native_decide
          have hfinal : 47 < ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (14535 * (3 * p)) := by
            have heq : 14535 * (3 * p) = 43605 * p := by ring
            rw [heq, ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop43605, hs43605, hsigp]
            norm_num
          exact hclose (3 * p) h3p hfinal
  · by_cases h5 : 5 ∣ eval
    · by_cases h17 : 17 ∣ eval
      · have h85 : (85:ℕ) ∣ eval := Nat.Coprime.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd (by norm_num) h5 h17
        exact hclose 85 h85 (by native_decide)
      · by_cases h19 : 19 ∣ eval
        · have h95 : (95:ℕ) ∣ eval := Nat.Coprime.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd (by norm_num) h5 h19
          exact hclose 95 h95 (by native_decide)
        · obtain ⟨p, hp, hpdvd, hpne⟩ := hexists_other 5 (by norm_num) h5 hnopow5
          have hp5cop : Nat.Coprime 5 p := (Nat.coprime_primes (by norm_num) hp).mpr (Ne.symm hpne)
          have h5p : (5 * p) ∣ eval := hp5cop.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd h5 hpdvd
          have hcop72675 : Nat.Coprime 72675 p := by
            have hfac : (72675:ℕ).primeFactors = {3, 5, 17, 19} := by native_decide
            refine ((hp.coprime_iff_not_dvd).mpr ?_).symm
            intro hpdvd72675
            have hpmem : p ∈ (72675:ℕ).primeFactors := Nat.mem_primeFactors.mpr ⟨hp, hpdvd72675, by norm_num⟩
            rw [hfac] at hpmem
            simp at hpmem
            rcases hpmem with rfl | rfl | rfl | rfl
            · exact h3 hpdvd
            · exact hpne rfl
            · exact h17 hpdvd
            · exact h19 hpdvd
          have hsigp : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 p = 2 := by
            rw [show p = p ^ 1 from (pow_one p).symm, ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply_prime_pow hp]
          have hs72675 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 72675 = 36 := by native_decide
          have hfinal : 47 < ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (14535 * (5 * p)) := by
            have heq : 14535 * (5 * p) = 72675 * p := by ring
            rw [heq, ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop72675, hs72675, hsigp]
            norm_num
          exact hclose (5 * p) h5p hfinal
    · by_cases h17 : 17 ∣ eval
      · by_cases h19 : 19 ∣ eval

          exact hclose 323 h323 (by native_decide)

          have hp17cop : Nat.Coprime 17 p := (Nat.coprime_primes (by norm_num) hp).mpr (Ne.symm hpne)

            rw [hfac] at hpmem

            · exact hpne rfl
            · exact h19 hpdvd
          have hsigp : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 p = 2 := by
            rw [show p = p ^ 1 from (pow_one p).symm, ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply_prime_pow hp]
          have hs247095 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 247095 = 36 := by native_decide
          have hfinal : 47 < ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (14535 * (17 * p)) := by
            have heq : 14535 * (17 * p) = 247095 * p := by ring
            rw [heq, ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop247095, hs247095, hsigp]
            norm_num
          exact hclose (17 * p) h17p hfinal
      · by_cases h19 : 19 ∣ eval
        · obtain ⟨p, hp, hpdvd, hpne⟩ := hexists_other 19 (by norm_num) h19 hnopow19
          have hp19cop : Nat.Coprime 19 p := (Nat.coprime_primes (by norm_num) hp).mpr (Ne.symm hpne)
          have h19p : (19 * p) ∣ eval := hp19cop.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd h19 hpdvd
          have hcop276165 : Nat.Coprime 276165 p := by
            have hfac : (276165:ℕ).primeFactors = {3, 5, 17, 19} := by native_decide

            intro hpdvd276165
            have hpmem : p ∈ (276165:ℕ).primeFactors := Nat.mem_primeFactors.mpr ⟨hp, hpdvd276165, by norm_num⟩
            rw [hfac] at hpmem

            rw [heq, ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop276165, hs276165, hsigp]

        · obtain ⟨p, hp, hpdvd⟩ := Nat.exists_prime_and_dvd (show eval ≠ 1 by omega)
          have hcop14535 : Nat.Coprime 14535 p := by
            have hfac : (14535:ℕ).primeFactors = {3, 5, 17, 19} := by native_decide

info.lean_statement: ∀ n N : ℕ, 84 < n → (⨆ m : Fin n, (m : ℕ) + ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 m) ≤ n + 2 → n = 2520 * N → N % 46189 = 26884 → False

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
